title: Review-required routing

commands.summary: Final S14 closeout gate rerun after evidence creation

commands.command: claude --add-dir /tmp --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode bypassPermissions --no-session-persistence --tools Read --allowedTools Read --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit,Grep,Glob --output-format stream-json --include-partial-messages --verbose -p <review prompt>
commands.summary: Single valid completed read-only S14 Claude review completed against /tmp/lfos-rp00-p02-m04-s14-review-packet.diff.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

All commands are local validation, parser, test, Claude read-only review, or git whitespace checks; none execute service logic, create runtime routes, invoke Claude runtime review, write review queues, write review assignments, send review notifications, replace human approval, evaluate runtime permission, call an AuthZ evaluator, run a permission engine, append audit ledgers, write audit events, persist idempotency records, write idempotency stores, acquire locks, persist lock records, write lock stores, create UI, write databases, write storage, write persistence records, write error records, map runtime errors, translate runtime exceptions, or persist product state.
Pre-closeout npm run rp00:control-plane:validate failed only because S14 evidence files were intentionally not created yet; this command is rerun after evidence creation as the final gate.

Claude C00 valid completed review ran once using claude-opus-4-8 effort=max read-only packet review. Claude rated the S14 implementation PASS/APPROVE with no P0/P1/P2 findings. The single P3 stale S15 failure-message finding was fixed before final production_ready.

evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review required before production_ready
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval is not replaced or synthesized by this deterministic synthetic Review-required routing path because no sensitive production mutation, client-facing output, external sharing, finance action, real data operation, runtime execution, permission engine execution, AuthZ evaluation, audit write, idempotency store write, lock acquisition, lock store write, persistence record write, error record write, runtime error mapping, exception translation, storage write, database write, UI creation, or product-state write occurs.
evidence_summary.review_required_routing_boundary: S14 prechecks the S13 Validation error mapping result as metadata only, emits canonical review-required routing metadata, fails closed on unsafe runtime Claude, review queue, assignment, notification, human approval, persistence, database, storage, UI, audit, AuthZ, permission, idempotency, lock, error, and source-completion claims, closes RP00.P02.M04, and hands off to RP00.P02.M05.S01.
